text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Helios & Palmer
text_block_list.text: Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's get this party started! I made chocolate
cookies!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Line them all up! This is the cheesecake I baked!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: I made tiramisu.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
I'll put my tarts here. I made more than usual, so
be sure to take one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I made some shrimp crackers to use as palate
cleansers! They're extra salty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Good thinking! You're a genius!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone begins laying out trays piled high with
homemade desserts. It looks just like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's a dessert buffet! Ahaha, amazing!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No cap, these are straight fire! Your cookies are
straight bussin', Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For real?! I want some!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The cheesecake and shrimp crackers are also
bussing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, Valentine's Day is so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and I'm working in my office
like usual, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ring, ring, ring ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer? Are you free right now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has asked me to meet her at
a cafe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We're having a Valentine's Day party! It's loads of
fun, and I want you to join us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's a Valentine's buffet with all kinds of snacks!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I made cookies, and—oh, I should go get you one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She returns with a homemade chocolate cookie in
hand.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Here you go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I really hope you like it. Go on, take a bite!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as I'm about to put the cookie in my mouth...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh, those cookies are goated! Straight fire!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Tannhauser, we saw you standing in
front of the cookies muttering about finding the
tastiest one...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, I can see why now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What?! No, I-I-I m-mean, w-wouldn't anybody
want to eat the most delicious one?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sure, whatever you say.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whatever! Just hurry up and eat it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's cookie is crunchy and
crumbles in my mouth. It's every bit as delicious
as I've been led to believe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
By the way, didn't you make something just for
your trainer, Tannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, of course! I made macarons.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You made extra sweets on the side?! Girl, you are down bad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: D-down bad?! No, no, no, no, I'm not down anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And aren't macarons, like, impossible to make?
Look at you!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Hold up. Don't some Valentine's desserts have
special meanings when you give them to
someone?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: They do?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
So if you gave us cookies and you gave your
trainer macarons, that means...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oho?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I shouldn't have said anything!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm gonna feel all awkward when I give them
to Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After classes finish on Valentine's Day, an
expressionless Matikanetannhauser comes to my
office.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...E-excuse me. Sorry to bother you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, no, nothing at all. Everything's A-OK!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway, here, I brought you these! Happy
Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
They're macarons. I held off on the sugar a bit, so
I hope you like them.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And also...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um, please don't look up what it means to give
someone macarons on Valentine's! I swear it was
totally just a coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You better not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her insistence is making me extremely curious...
At any rate, the macarons are delicately crafted
and incredibly scrumptious.
